title: tsara`ath #6883
definition:
1) leprosy
    1a) in people, malignant skin disease (\\#Le 13:1-14:57\\)
    1b) in clothing, a mildew or mould (\\#Le 13:47-52\\)
    1c) in buildings, a mildew or mould (\\#Le 14:34-53\\)
